Access the Schedules on the Web 
If you do not have a device that supports the app, you can access web versions when connected to the internet through a mobile device or computer.
View the online schedules
Recommended Child and Adolescent Immunization Schedule ages 18 years of age and younger 
Recommended Adult Immunization Schedule ages 19 and older 
Feedback on App 
Your feedback is encouraged. If you have suggestions for improving the app, please email: NCIRDwebteam@cdc.gov .
